name: Yuka Group Inc.
summary: Yuka Group Inc. focuses on supporting the opening and maintenance of precious metal mines. It also has a joint venture with WBC Holdings to help fund the development of hydrogen fueled electric generator. The company was formerly known as Grand Capital Ventures, Inc. and changed its name to Yuka Group Inc. in February 2021. Yuka Group Inc. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Miami, Florida.
